basics.name: Alex Johnson
basics.label: AI Engineer
basics.summary: AI Engineer with 9+ years of software engineering experience, specializing in agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines, knowledge graphs, and MLOps. Experienced in building production-grade retrieval and generation systems using LangGraph, Google ADK, and cloud-native architectures on GCP and AWS. Proven track record in designing multi-agent orchestration workflows, vector search infrastructure, and end-to-end ML deployment pipelines.

work.name: HealthTech Corp
work.summary: Working on ContractAI and enterprise AI systems for document understanding, retrieval, and workflow automation.
highlights: Contributed to ContractAI, customer care log classification, and several other AI initiatives, building intelligent systems for document understanding, knowledge retrieval, and workflow automation.
Processed unstructured contract documents using Google Document AI to extract entities, clauses, and key business terms for downstream analysis and search.
Designed extraction and ingestion pipelines using both vector and graph storage patterns, leveraging Neo4j for relationship modeling and node level embeddings.
Built knowledge graphs and domain ontologies for contractual data to model entities, obligations, dependencies, and semantic relationships across documents.
Developed agentic retrieval workflows and intelligent agents to query and traverse the knowledge graph, improving contextual retrieval and reasoning over contract data.
Created an MCP server on top of the knowledge graph to expose graph aware tools and structured retrieval capabilities for agent driven workflows.
Built backend services with FastAPI and developed user facing interfaces to enable contract exploration, search, and AI assisted interactions.
Established evaluation workflows for retrievers and generation systems using DeepEval and related methods to measure retrieval quality, answer quality, and system reliability.
Implemented parallel agent execution, supervisor patterns, ReAct loops, and agentic AI workflows to support multi step reasoning and coordinated task execution.
Supported fine tuning efforts for BERT and RoBERTa based models on Vertex AI, partnering with data scientists to improve task specific model performance.
Contributed to MLOps workflows on Google Cloud by supporting training, deployment, evaluation, and lifecycle management for AI and machine learning systems.

work.name: TalentAI Inc
work.summary: Built an AI-powered talent management platform with RAG, agent orchestration, and production-grade retrieval pipelines.
highlights: Built an AI powered talent management platform using Retrieval Augmented Generation and multi agent orchestration to standardize hiring workflows, reduce bias, and decrease time to hire.
Designed and implemented multi agent workflows in LangGraph, with specialized agents for conversation management, retrieval, candidate matching, routing, and orchestration.
Developed MCP based tool calling infrastructure by creating custom MCP servers and reusable tools to support agent actions, external integrations, and workflow execution.

Built a document ingestion and preprocessing pipeline using Unstructured.io and Docling to clean source content, normalize formats, extract metadata, and prepare enterprise documents for downstream retrieval.
Implemented semantic chunking with overlap strategies to preserve context across chunks, and generated embeddings using Amazon Titan Text Embeddings for high quality retrieval.

Engineered a Milvus based vector search layer using collections, metadata filtering, keyword search, and hybrid retrieval; configured HNSW indexing for low latency approximate nearest neighbor search at scale.
Improved retrieval quality by implementing cross encoder reranking and post retrieval evaluation metrics to track relevance and system performance.
Built a query optimization pipeline with query rewriting and balancing techniques to improve retrieval precision and generation quality; integrated Presidio for PII detection and redaction.
Implemented semantic query caching with Redis vector storage to identify similar historical queries and reuse optimized retrieval paths, reducing latency and compute cost.
Applied advanced prompting strategies, including few shot prompting, dynamic prompting, and structured reasoning patterns, and used Promptfoo to test and compare prompt performance across tasks.

Developed CI and CD based evaluation pipelines with DeepEval to validate faithfulness, context recall, answer relevance, retrieval quality, and regression safety across RAG and agent workflows before release.
Implemented guardrails for safety and compliance using AWS services and Hugging Face libraries to detect and control PII exposure, toxicity, and tone related issues.
Developed backend APIs, API Gateway integrations, and a React frontend to deliver recruiter facing and candidate facing workflows through a scalable full stack application.
Integrated Langfuse for end to end observability, including prompt versioning, tool call tracing, retrieval context tracking, agent transition monitoring, and latency analysis.

work.name: GlobalSoft Solutions
work.summary: Designed and operated ML feature pipelines, model serving, deployment automation, and monitoring workflows.
highlights: Designed and maintained offline and online feature pipelines, including schema validation, time-based aggregations, and consistency between training and serving data.
Implemented real-time feature updates using incremental writes and TTLs to keep features fresh and production aligned.
Deployed and operated real-time model serving APIs on Amazon SageMaker, managing authentication, versioned endpoints, traffic routing, and rollback strategies.
Built scalable batch inference pipelines for large datasets with idempotent outputs and full input/output traceability.
Integrated A/B testing and shadow deployments to safely evaluate new models against live production traffic.
Used MLflow for experiment tracking, logging parameters and metrics, and managing model versions via the model registry.
Automated model packaging and deployment through CI/CD pipelines, promoting models across dev, staging, and production environments.
Implemented monitoring and alerting for model latency, error rates, and data drift to detect production issues early.
Supported automated retraining workflows, triggering pipelines based on performance degradation or data quality signals.

work.name: TechBridge IT Services
work.summary: Built backend microservices and automated testing pipelines for enterprise applications.
highlights: Built and deployed Spring Boot microservices using JPA/Hibernate, applying design patterns and Java 8 features for scalable backend development.
Developed automation frameworks using Selenium, TestNG, RESTAssured, and BDD, improving UI and API test coverage and maintainability.
Containerized Java and Python services with Docker and deployed on AWS EC2 and S3, ensuring high availability and production stability.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Git, automating builds, tests, and deployments for faster and reliable software delivery.
